query:
SELECT g.id, g.phase, g.roundNumber, 
       tA.name AS teamA, g.scoreA, g.scoreB, tB.name AS teamB,
       g.matchDate, g.status, g.externalId
FROM games g
LEFT JOIN teams tA ON g.teamAId = tA.id
LEFT JOIN teams tB ON g.teamBId = tB.id
WHERE g.tournamentId = 60001
ORDER BY g.matchDate DESC LIMIT 10;
command:

       g.matchDate, g.status, g.externalId

LEFT JOIN teams tA ON g.teamAId = tA.id
LEFT JOIN teams tB ON g.teamBId = tB.id
WHERE g.tournamentId = 60001
